package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/base64"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_for_binary_transport: Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag base64 encode/decode roundtrips inside a single process boundary.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario589Negative(values [][]byte) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(value))
	}
	return out
}
